1.description: resolve Drammen kommunenummer and get municipality geometry

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons (will be reduced to municipality extent)

3.description: get parcels in the municipality with area > 5000 m2

4.description: reduce 200-year flood polygons to Drammen extent (flomareal ∩ kommune)

5.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced 200-year flood polygons

6.description: one row per parcel with its area (deduplicate parcels that hit multiple flood polygons)
